gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 review found an import-order isolation blocker where the legacy facade could capture public monkeypatches as defaults. The facade now loads pristine document defaults from disk, preserves public BenchmarkCommandResult identity, and adds a regression test. Re-review approved with no blockers.
scope: restaurant_kv_serving.benchmark_plan_executor compatibility facade and benchmark plan executor tests.
verification: secret scan completed; only existing detector fixtures and prior evidence text matched, no live credentials found
what_changed: Replaced the duplicated restaurant benchmark-plan executor implementation with a document-owned compatibility facade.
Added an import-order regression test proving legacy defaults do not capture public document-module monkeypatches installed before legacy import.
why: The generalized package should own benchmark plan execution in document_kv_cache while restaurant_kv_serving remains a migration-only compatibility namespace.
